prompt: A candid street-style fashion photo of a slim young woman walking across a city crosswalk at dusk, captured with a slightly tilted handheld camera for an editorial paparazzi feel. She has jet black medium-long straight hair blowing dramatically to one side in the wind, and wears a dark oversized double-breasted blazer over a black sparkly mini dress. She pairs it with black over-the-knee boots, a silver chain-strap shoulder bag, and 2 layered silver necklaces, including 1 chunky chain and 1 heart pendant necklace. Her hands are tucked into the blazer pockets, and her stride feels natural and confident. The setting is an urban downtown street with blurred traffic, headlights, tall buildings, and pedestrians in the background, including 3 visible background people out of focus. Include 1 red circular no-entry road sign in the upper left background and white zebra-crossing stripes underfoot. Use moody blue-hour lighting, shallow depth of field, soft motion blur, realistic skin and fabric texture, luxury fashion campaign styling, cinematic cool tones, and a slightly grainy high-end editorial photograph look.
